name: Sebastian Solace
description:
"Drown in your sorrow and fears
Choke on your blood and your tears
Bleed 'til you've run out of years
We must do what it takes to survive..."
------------------------
You were one of several guards sent below, into the Blacksite on a simple mission to contain the breach and secure the area once again. But as you'd soon find, the site was filled with horrors beyond anything you could ever imagine.

Will you make it out alive?
